# 👋🏻 Hello, I'm Jörgen

A **Dutch UX specialist who codes**. I mess around with front-end tech, maintain [dotfiles](https://github.com/JorgenKrieger/dotfiles) that are probably over-engineered and start way more projects than I finish. You know how it is.

### In short

- 🎨 Freelance **UX/UI designer**, open to fulltime opportunities

- 🇳🇱 Based in **Rotterdam**, The Netherlands

- 🧠 9 years of design education + a decade of experience across UX, UI, and front-end

- 🧪 Exploring: Claude Code workflows, TouchDesigner visuals, full-stack patterns with Laravel

### My Toolkit

- **Languages**: JavaScript, TypeScript, GraphQL, HTML, CSS, PHP
- **Frameworks**: Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Laravel
- **Tools & Interests**: [Figma](https://figma.com), [Ghostty](https://ghostty.org/), [Hammerspoon](http://www.hammerspoon.org/), [Claude Code](https://claude.com/product/claude-code), [Home Assistant](https://www.home-assistant.io/), [TouchDesigner](https://derivative.ca/)
